commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And all nations shall serve him, and his son, and his son's son, until the very time of his own land comes: and then many nations and great kings shall enslave him. His son; viz. , Evilmerodach, and his son's son, viz. , Nabonydus, or Nabonadius, the Baltassar of Daniel, (chap. ) and the last of the Chaldean kings. (Challoner) Come. It will not be long before this rod is cast into the fire, the usual fate of those who execute God's vengeance.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
